text: [MUSIC PLAYING]

Good morning, precious
saints, how are you
doing on this morning?

You know, we love coming
to you with the word of God

this entire week, we're in
the book of Psalms.

Reading some of me and my
wife's favorite psalms to you.

We know these scriptures
will encourage you,

because these are the
same scriptures that God

used to encourage us and bring
direction into our lives,

bring strength into our
lives, bring encouragement
into our lives.

Right when we are at
the point of giving up,

the Holy Ghost would
remind us of some

of these same scriptures,
and all of a sudden,

here comes the breakthrough,
here comes the victory.
And before we worship--

before we worship and pray
this morning, glory to God,

I feel the anointing
of God here.

Yes, God, I feel the
anointing of God.

Come on just lift your hands to
heaven before I read the Word.
(SINGING) We love you, Jesus. We love you. We love you, Lord.
Oh, we love You.
We love you, Jesus.

(SPEAKING) My God, I feel the
anointing descending here.
There is no one--

(SINGING) -- there is
no one else like you.
For you are great.

(SPEAKING) Come on,
sing it with me.

(SINGING) You do
miracles so great.
There is no one else like you.
There is no one else like you.
For you are great.
You do miracles so great.
There is no one else like you.
There is no one else like you.

(SPEAKING) Friend, this morning,
I want to read the Word of God

to you, coming from the
Book of Psalms, Chapter 121.

Oh, my gosh, I love
this psalms as well.
Listen to what David said.

I will lift up mine eyes unto
the hills from whence cometh
my help.

My help cometh from
the Lord, which
made the heaven and earth.

Listen, listen to me real
good brother, sister.

He will not suffer
your foot to be moved.

He that keepeth thee
will not slumber.

Whoever is plotting against
you, they're wasting their time.

Of course, we know our
arch enemy, the Devil,
is always plotting against us.

But he has to work
through people that's
willing to cooperate with him.

And listen, I don't
care what the enemy is

planning against you this
morning, It can't work.
God is on your side.

He doesn't slumber,
nor does He sleep.

Listen now to what Verse
Five says in Psalms 121.
The Lord is thy keeper.

The Lord is thy shade
upon thy right hand.

The sun shall not smite thee
by day, nor the moon by night.

Simply means this,
no matter what

comes against you when the sun
is out, or when the sun is down

and the moon comes
out, no matter

what comes against you all
day long, God doesn't slumber,
He doesn't sleep.
God's got your back.
He is on the job 24/7.

He is watching you right now,
this very second this morning.
God is looking at you right now.
And he's got your back.

The plans of the enemy
cannot come to pass.

Listen to Verse Seven, the
Lord shall preserve thee
from all evil.

Oh, my God, I love
the word of God.

Let me read that
Verse Seven again.

The Lord shall preserve
you from all evil.
He shall preserve your soul.

Preserve means he is
going to keep you,

and it doesn't matter
what comes against you,
He is going to keep you.

And when the dust and--
when the dust settles,

and the smoke
clears, you're still
going to be standing strong.

Listen to what the Bible
says in Verse Eight.

The Lord shall preserve
thy going out and thy

coming in from this time
forth, even forever more.

You are getting
ready, some of you
are getting ready to go to work.

Some of you are getting
ready to come in from work.

God said, it doesn't
matter whether you

are going or coming,
the Bible says,

he will preserve your
going out and coming in.

That means he is
going to keep you.

He is going to keep
watch over you.
He's got your back.

Glory to God, come on and
lift your hands this morning
and just help me worship Him.
(SINGING) Oh we love you, Lord.
Lord, we love you.
We love you, Lord.
For You are great.
You do miracles so great.
There is no one else like You.
There is no one else like You.
For You are great.
You do miracles so great.
There is no one else like You.

(SPEAKING) Feel the
presence of God.

(SINGING) There is
no one else like You.
For You are great.
For You are great.
Yes, God.
You do miracles so great.

(SPEAKING) Come on, lift
your hands to heaven
and sing with me.

(SINGING) There is
no one else like You.
There is no one--
there is no one else like You.
For You are great.
Yes, God.
You do miracles so great.
There is no one else like You.
There is no one else like You.

(SPEAKING) Father,
I pray over Your
precious children this morning.

Dear brother, I join
my faith with you.

Dear sister, I join
my faith with you.

I cover you in the
blood of Jesus Christ.
You are God's property.

You have been bought with
the precious blood of Jesus,

and no weapon that's formed
against you this morning
will be able to prosper.

And every tongue,
every lying tongue,

every gossiping,
deceptive, deceiving tongue

that rises up against
you, in judgment
we condemn it right now.

We bind every foul
and unclean spirit
that's risen against you.
We bind the works of the devil.
We curse the attacks of the enemy.
We break it.
The snare is broken.
And you are escaped.

Your help is in the
name of the Lord, which
made the heavens and the earth.

God is on your
side this morning.

God is on your
side this morning.

I cover you in
the name of Jesus.

I pray strength
into your spirit.
I pray strength into your soul.

I pray strength into
your body this morning.

As you march
forward in this day,

I declare that you are
more than a conqueror
in the name of Jesus.

If God be for you, who
can be against you?

I declare that no weapon
formed against you this day
will be able to prosper.

I cover you and I pray
divine protection over you

from accidents, from plane
crashes, from food poisoning,

from witchcraft, from
every demonic attack that
would come against you.

I cancel the plans of the
devil. , For the Bible says,

we know that all things, it works
together for good to those who

love God, even to them that
are called according to his
purpose.

You are called according
to his purpose.
God is on your side.
I want you to hear me real good.
God is on your side.

Jesus said, I'll
never leave you.
I'll never forsake you.

I'll be with you
even unto the end.
He is with you today, my friend.
We want you to know we love you.
March forward in victory.

Be strong and of good courage,
for the Lord your God is
with you wherever you go.
He loves you.

And listen, friend,
if you know someone

that needs this
broadcast, that can

use a word of encouragement,
that can use a person,

and that needs someone
to just strengthen them,

I'm asking you share this
with your friend on Facebook.

Share this with your friend
on Twitter, Pinterest,
through WhatsApp, on YouTube.

Share it with someone,
use this message as a tool
to encourage someone you know.
You know we love you guys.

We appreciate you, and we can't
wait to see you again tomorrow

morning, and pray along with
you, join our faith with you.
In Jesus' name we pray.
Amen.
Love you, God bless, bye-bye.
